title: How the 1994 World Cup Transformed the Business of Football Forever | Odd Lots
title_cn: 1994 年世界杯如何永远改变了足球行业 |零股
summary: The last time the World Cup came to the US was 1994. Before then, the World Cup was an enormously popular event with surprisingly limited commercial significance. The 1990 tournament in Italy, for instance, lost money for broadcasters. But that all changed in 1994, when American companies sought to make their mark in the form of advertisements and sponsorships: firms like McDonalds, Mastercard, and General Motors saw the potential to reach a global audience through one of the world's most watched sports events. On this episode, we speak with Joey D'Urso, a freelance sports journalist and author of the recent book, More Than A Shirt: How Football Shirts Explain Global Politics, Money and Power. We talk about the changes from the 1994 World Cup and this year's competition, which is being held jointly, by the US, Canada, and Mexico. We also talk about other surprising stories of corporate and geopolitical influence in football. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Climbs as Lower Dollar, AI Rally Counter Rate Concerns
title_cn: 美元走低、人工智能反弹抵消了利率担忧，铜价上涨
summary: Copper edged higher, after touching a seven-week low on Wednesday, as a weakening dollar and an artificial intelligence stock rally buoyed sentiment for the metal used in electrification.

Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-China Exec of Advertising Giant Sentenced to Life in $176 Million Bribery Case

title: Stretched Tech Valuations Raise Questions on Capex, BofA Says
title_cn: 美银表示，科技股估值过高引发资本支出问题
summary: Sebastian Raedler, head of European equity strategy at Bank of America, discusses his concern that the tech rally is overdone after US chipmaker Micron gained on a blockbuster sales forecast. "Who is going to pay for this capital expenditure that is basically fueling the Micron demand," Raedler asks during an interview on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Earnings Inflate the AI Bubble: 3-Minutes MLIV

summary: Micron Technology Inc. surged in late trading after its quarterly sales forecast crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong. The largest US maker of computer memory chips, said revenue will be approximately $50 billion in the fiscal fourth quarter, which runs through August. Bloomberg's Ruhell Amin breaks down the numbers. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: DigitalBridge Group Inc. is considering options for Malaysia’s AIMS Data Centre Holding Sdn., including raising funds, bringing in new investors or an outright sale, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Canadian Defence Minister on Indo-Pacific Strategy

summary: David McGuinty, Canadian Defence Minister, discusses his trip to Tokyo, where he met with his counterpart, Japanese Defence Minister Shinjirō Koizumi, to discuss cooperation and investment into the defense industry. He says the nation is planning to send more warships to the region, to increase presence in Japan, Korea and the Philippines. He speaks exclusively with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Churn Before Micron’s Earnings as Oil Sinks | The Close 6/24/2026

Today's guests are HSBC US Head of International Wealth, Asset MGMT & Global Private Banking  Racquel Oden, Vanguard Investment Strategy Group Global Head of Capital Market Research Qian Wang, Morgan Health CEO Dan Mendelson, Novo Nordisk Executive Vice President, US Operations Jamey Millar, DoubleLine Capital Depot Chief Investment Officer Jeffrey Sherman, Wedbush Securities Equity Research Managing Director Matt Bryson, Deepwater Asset Management  Managing Partner Gene Munster, Redfin Chief Economist Daryl Fairweather, Tickitto Founder & CEO Dana Lattouf, & On Location President Paul Caine. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warren Calls for AI Antitrust Scrutiny, Deal Review Revamp
title_cn: 沃伦呼吁进行人工智能反垄断审查、修改交易审查
summary: Massachusetts Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren urged Congress to push for greater antitrust enforcement on emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence and to revamp merger law to make more information public.

title: DoubleLine’s Sherman: AI ‘Early’ in Tapping Bond Market
title_cn: DoubleLine 的谢尔曼：人工智能进入债券市场处于“早期”阶段
summary: Jeff Sherman, Deputy Chief Investment officer at DoubleLine Capital, joined the program to analyze recent developments in the U.S. Treasury market. The discussion focused on recent moves in Treasury yields, including a notable drop in the 10-year yield by 10 basis points to just above 4.3%. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Health CEO: Tech, GLP-1s, Labor Driving up Costs
title_cn: 摩根健康首席执行官：技术、GLP-1、劳动力推高了成本
summary: Dan Mendelson, CEO of Morgan Health, highlighted the disproportionate impact of rising health insurance costs on small businesses in the U.S., citing premium increases of 20-25% as a significant challenge. He explained that cost drivers include expensive new medical technologies like GLP-1 drugs and labor costs, which constitute about 70% of hospital expenses. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Forecast Shatters Estimates
title_cn: 美光预测超出预期
summary: Micron the largest US maker of computer memory chips, delivered a sales forecast that topped Wall Street estimates after AI-fueled shortages of the components sent prices soaring.  Bloomberg Intelligence Semiconductor Analyst Jake Silverman and Host of Bloomberg Tech Ed Ludlow react saying the earnings show Micron's pricing power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Poised to Lose Two More Senior AI Staffers to Anthropic
title_cn: 谷歌准备再向 Anthropic 流失两名高级 AI 员工
summary: Two leading artificial intelligence researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google are planning to leave for rival Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a series of high-profile departures that risk undercutting the search giant’s position in AI.Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel, both viewed internally as key contributors to Google’s Gemini AI model, are set to move to the Claude maker, said the people, who spoke on condition of anonymity as the information is not public.

title: Micron's Growth Rate Is Remarkable, Munster Says
title_cn: 蒙斯特表示，美光的增长率非常惊人
summary: Deepwater Asset Management Managing Partner Gene Munster breaks down Micron earnings on "Bloomberg The Close." He says hyperscalers will grow faster for longer than investors expected. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Team Looks at Treasury Breakup and BOE Reforms
title_cn: 伯纳姆团队研究财政部拆分和英国央行改革
summary: Influential figures in Andy Burnham’s entourage have urged the would-be prime minister to break up the Treasury to refocus the government’s agenda on growth.

title: Germany's Defense Sector Has 'Long Way to Go': Minister
title_cn: 德国国防部长：德国国防部门还有“很长的路要走”
summary: Germany Deputy Defense Minister Nils Schmid says the decision to scrap a €10 billion ($11.4 billion) warship purchase and the demise of a joint fighter-jet project with France this month show that the country’s industry needs to catch up with ambitions for a military buildup. Schmid speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kerry Says Iran War 'Never Should Have Happened'
title_cn: 克里称伊朗战争“根本不应该发生”
summary: Former Secretary of State John Kerry discusses the conflict between the US and Iran and ongoing negotiations between Washington and Tehran to reach a deal. "It is going to be exceedingly difficult to get the Iranians to give up more than they had in a prior agreement," Kerry tells Bloomberg Television. He adds the Obama-era deal, the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA) was "the strongest" nuclear agreement in history. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Swedish Opposition Sees Bank Tax Helping Households Spend More
title_cn: 瑞典反对派认为银行税有助于家庭增加支出
summary: A tax that Sweden’s opposition Social Democrats want to levy on the country’s banks would lead to lower costs for households and help them regain some of the purchasing power they lost over recent years, according to the party’s economic spokesperson.

title: German Defense Sector Has ‘Long Way to Go,’ Deputy Minister Says
title_cn: 副部长表示德国国防部门“还有很长的路要走”
summary: Germany’s decision to scrap a €10 billion ($11.4 billion) warship purchase and the demise of a joint fighter-jet project with France this month show that the country’s industry needs to catch up with ambitions for a military buildup, a senior defense official said.

title: Zambia’s Inflation Rate Declines to Lowest Level in Eight Years
title_cn: 赞比亚通胀率降至八年来最低水平
summary: Zambia’s inflation rate fell in June to the lowest level since early 2018, as price growth softened slightly across the board.

title: Johannesburg Adds 700 Managers as City Struggles to Pay Bills
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡增加了 700 名经理，因为该市难以支付账单
summary: Johannesburg plans to add 1,000 managers and professionals to its workforce, according to budget documents, even as the city fails to pay bills for power and fuel supplies.

title: EU Gives US Trade Deal Final Approval Ahead of Trump Deadline
title_cn: 欧盟在特朗普最后期限前最终批准美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union’s US trade deal is set to go into effect after the bloc gave its final sign-off, banking that the pact will ensure some stability despite ongoing economic tensions.

title: Kenyan Police Block Roads Before Deadly Protest Anniversary
title_cn: 肯尼亚警方在致命抗议周年纪念日之前封锁道路
summary: Kenyan police blocked major roads into Nairobi and cordoned off parliament buildings before planned marches to mark two years since deadly anti-government demonstrations.

title: Foreign Policy Gap Leaves Burnham Exposed to Global Crises
title_cn: 外交政策差距使伯纳姆面临全球危机
summary: In his final weeks as Britain’s prime minister, Keir Starmer, has repeatedly warned how “dangerous and volatile” the world is becoming. Andy Burnham is on a collision course with it.

title: Micron Earnings Spark Global Tech Rebound | Daybreak Europe 6/25/2026
title_cn: 美光盈利引发全球科技股反弹黎明欧洲 6/25/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Global stocks rebounded from a two-day slide as Micron’s blowout sales forecast reignited enthusiasm for the AI trade. The largest US maker of computer memory chips surged in late trading.

And NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte played to President Donald Trump’s love of praise and splashy visuals during a visit to Washington that was aimed at easing the US leader’s anger over alliance nations’ reluctance to help with the campaign against Iran.

Today's guests:  Modupe Adegbembo, Economist, Jefferies; Edwin Millar, Climate Economist, Bank of England & NGFS Climate Economist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australian Government Secures Passage of Housing Tax Overhaul
title_cn: 澳大利亚政府确保住房税改革获得通过
summary: Australia’s center-left government has successfully pushed through parliament its overhaul of taxation of the property market, with the government wagering the changes will make housing more affordable for younger Australians.

title: China Makes New US Warship Target for Missile Tests, Images Show
title_cn: 图片显示，中国将美国军舰作为导弹试验的新目标
summary: China has built a new US destroyer replica at a remote missile-testing site in its northwestern desert, satellite imagery shows, a target analysts say could be used to test anti-ship weapons.

title: US and India Conclude Latest Trade Talks With No Clarity Over Deal
title_cn: 美国和印度结束最新贸易谈判，但协议未明确
summary: The US and India concluded trade talks this week, though neither side said whether they had narrowed the differences holding up an interim agreement.

title: UK Plc Warns Burnham More Tax Hikes Would Push Firms Over Edge
title_cn: 英国公司警告伯纳姆进一步加税将迫使企业陷入困境
summary: Britain’s next prime minister must not pile more pressure on companies with further tax rises, one of the country’s largest business lobby groups has warned.

title: Property Mogul With Ties to Rachel Reeves Left UK Before Tax Hit
title_cn: 与雷切尔·里夫斯有联系的房地产大亨在税收打击前离开英国
summary: A property magnate whose firm spent years forging ties with UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves left Britain the same week tax rises she implemented took effect, underlining the governing Labour Party’s frayed relations with the nation’s wealthy elite.

title: ‘Mad as a Murder Hornet’ Trump Squabbles With Disaffected Senate
title_cn: “疯狂如谋杀大黄蜂”特朗普与心怀不满的参议院发生争执
summary: Tensions between Donald Trump and US Senate Republicans crescendoed to a fever-pitch during a Wednesday lunch after a 24-hour exchange that saw lawmakers rebuke the president over the war with Iran while he abruptly canceled a signing ceremony for legislation that the GOP sees as essential to its midterm election efforts.

title: Taiwan Starts Washington Flights in Milestone for Uncertain Ties
title_cn: 台湾开通华盛顿航班，应对不确定的关系具有里程碑意义
summary: Taiwan is set to inaugurate its first-ever non-stop flight to the US capital, a move carrying significant political symbolism amid concerns over the Trump administration’s stance on the island.

title: US Protests China’s Visa Rules by Snubbing APEC Meeting in Macau
title_cn: 美国冷落澳门亚太经合组织会议，抗议中国签证规定
summary: The US has decided against sending senior officials to an Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation meeting in Macau, blaming what it called China’s “discriminatory” visa rules on American diplomats.

title: Trump Says ‘America is Back’ in Rally Marking 250th US Birthday
title_cn: 特朗普在纪念美国诞辰 250 周年集会上称“美国回来了”
summary: President Donald Trump centered himself and his policies as key to the future of American greatness as he turned an event tied to celebrations for the 250th anniversary of the US into a campaign-style rally.

title: Twitch Star Hasan Piker Notches a Win With NYC’s Socialists
title_cn: Twitch 明星哈桑·派克 (Hasan Piker) 赢得纽约市社会主义者的支持
summary: If Tuesday’s sweep by Democratic socialists across New York validated Mayor Zohran Mamdani as the city’s kingmaker, it also established controversial streamer Hasan Piker as an emerging power behind the throne.

title: Chile Senate Floor Backs Base Text of President Kast’s Mega Economic Bill
title_cn: 智利参议院支持卡斯特总统的大型经济法案的基本文本
summary: Chile’s Senate floor narrowly gave initial approval to President José Antonio Kast’s economic omnibus bill despite calls to delay the vote, setting up a tense next stage as lawmakers prepare for article-by-article debate.

title: Lockheed Wins $35 Billion US Deal to Boost Interceptor Output
title_cn: 洛克希德公司赢得 350 亿美元的美国订单以提高拦截机产量
summary: Lockheed Martin Corp. has been awarded a contract worth as much as $35 billion from the US Defense Department to quadruple production of missile-defense interceptors as part of a broader effort by the Trump administration to bolster munitions output.

title: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte on Oval Office Meeting | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/24/2026
title_cn: 北约秘书长马克·吕特在椭圆形办公室会议上|权力平衡：最新版 06/24/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, a Nevada Democrat and member of the Senate Banking and Finance Committees, reacts to President Trump's last-minute cancellation of a scheduled signing for a bipartisan housing bill as he pushes the SAVE America Act. NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte discusses his Oval Office meeting with President Trump, Ukraine’s progress in its war with Russia, Trump’s push to get NATO in “better shape,” and Europe’s efforts to take on more responsibility for its own defense. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia’s Spy Chief Warns of Rising Terror, Cyber Threats
title_cn: 澳大利亚间谍头子警告恐怖和网络威胁不断上升
summary: Australia’s spy chief highlighted anti-semitic attacks such as the December massacre at Bondi Beach, a neo-Nazi bombing, cyber-threats by foreign governments and traditional espionage as just some of the security events his agency is trying to prevent.

title: Sen. Cortez Masto: SAVE Act Would 'Rig' Election
title_cn: 参议员科尔特斯·马斯托：储蓄法案将“操纵”选举
summary: Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, a Nevada Democrat and member of the Senate Banking and Finance Committees, reacts to President Trump's last-minute cancellation of a scheduled signing for a bipartisan housing bill as he pushes the SAVE America Act. She argues the SAVE America Act would disenfranchise voters and "rig" elections to the President's benefit. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rutte Says Trump Is Getting NATO Into 'Better Shape'
title_cn: 吕特称特朗普正在让北约进入“更好的状态”
summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte discusses Europe’s efforts to take on more responsibility for its own defense and Ukraine’s progress in its war with Russia after his meeting with US President Donald Trump at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)
